name: Tofu and Broccoli Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Broccoli; cut into bite-size pieces
1 lb Tofu; fresh (bean curd) cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. For sauce, stir together water, sherry, soy sauce, cornstarch, ginger, and red pepper. Set aside.
2. Spray a cold wok or large skillet with non-stick coating. Preheat the wok or skillet over medium heat.
3. Add garlic; stir-fry for 15 seconds.
4. Add broccoli; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Add onion; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
6. Add bean sprouts; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Push vegetables from the center of the wok or skillet.
8. Stir sauce; add to the center of the wok or skillet. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
9. Cook and stir for 1 minute.
10. Stir vegetables into the sauce; stir in tofu. Heat through.
11. Serve with rice.
